message.content:
{
  "competency_groups": [
    {
      "code": "C1-U6",
      "title": "Haloalkanes and Haloarenes Competencies",
      "description": "Understanding the nature of C-X bond, preparation methods, physical properties, chemical reactions, and polyhalogen compounds.",
      "competencies": [
        "Analyze the polarity and reactivity of the carbon-halogen (C–X) bond in haloalkanes and haloarenes",
        "Evaluate various laboratory and industrial methods for preparing haloalkanes and haloarenes",
        "Predict chemical reaction outcomes based on functional group transformations"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit 6",
      "chapter_name": "Haloalkanes and Haloarenes"
    },
    {
      "code": "C1-U7",
      "title": "Alcohols, Phenols and Ethers Competencies",
      "description": "Mastering the structures of functional groups, properties of alcohols and phenols, important commercial alcohols, and ethers.",
      "competencies": [
        "Differentiate between the structural characteristics and acidity of alcohols versus phenols",
        "Identify commercially significant alcohols and their specific applications in industry",
        "Determine physical properties and reactivity patterns distinguishing ethers from other oxygenated compounds"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit 7",
      "chapter_name": "Alcohols, Phenols and Ethers"
    },
    {
      "code": "C1-U8",
      "title": "Aldehydes, Ketones and Carboxylic Acids Competencies",
      "description": "Exploring carbonyl group structures, preparation methods, physical properties, chemical reactions, and uses of aldehydes, ketones, and carboxylic acids.",
      "competencies": [
        "Compare the reactivity differences between aldehydes and ketones based on their structural features",
        "Synthesize strategies for preparing carboxylic acids from various precursor compounds",
        "Correlate physical properties with chemical behavior in carbonyl-containing functional groups"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit 8",
      "chapter_name": "Aldehydes, Ketones and Carboxylic Acids"
    },
    {
      "code": "C1-U9",
      "title": "Amines Competencies",
      "description": "Focusing on amine nomenclature, preparation methods, physical properties, chemical reactions, and the synthesis of aromatic compounds via diazonium salts.",
      "competencies": [
        "Classify amines based on structure and apply IUPAC nomenclature rules accurately",
        "Design synthetic pathways for preparing primary, secondary, and tertiary amines",
        "Utilize diazonium salt reactions to synthesize complex aromatic compounds"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit 9",
      "chapter_name": "Amines"
    },
    {
      "code": "C1-U10",
      "title": "Biomolecules Competencies",
      "description": "Investigating the structure and function of proteins, enzymes, vitamins, nucleic acids, hormones, and carbohydrates.",
      "competencies": [
        "Explain the hierarchical structural organization of proteins and their biological functions as enzymes",
        "Categorize essential vitamins based on solubility and physiological roles in human health",
        "Analyze the role of nucleic acids and hormones in genetic information transfer and metabolic regulation"
      ],
      "unit_name": "Unit 10",
      "chapter_name": "Biomolecules"
    }
  ]
}
